primary_blocker: Wife is the key decision-maker and was not on the call — offer deadline passed
key_intelligence: Status-quo-resistant with a spousal blocker (wife not on call). Offer deadline passed before both parties could align. PATTERN: Two-person decisions where the second person isn't on the initial call have significantly lower conversion rates. Push for a second call that includes both decision-makers, or design follow-up materials explicitly for the absent party to review.
top_objections: My wife isn't sure about it
We need to discuss it together
lead_language: I need to discuss it with my wife
lost_reason: Wife blocker — second decision-maker not included. Offer expired before alignment achieved.
